rationale: rn-implement init only normalizes direct IDs; passing an EPIC with pre-existing children (parent: linked) requires manual enumeration or shell-piping ll-issues list --parent. Add explicit --context epic=EPIC-XXX flag that resolves children at init time, preserving cycle detection, check_blocked_by gating, and re_enqueue_unblocked flow. Mirrors ENH-2658 ids filter pattern on prompt-across-issues.
rule: Captured: Add --epic flag to rn-implement for auto-resolving children
